attr.title: GeminiArms
attr.desc: GeminiArms is a side scrolling 2D shoot'em up with a twinstick twist. Get inside the ultimate weapon, GEMINI ARMS, and save the world from the Federal force deadly laser weapon.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam and copy all game files into assets folder. Devices with H700 cpu and above are recommended for performance reasons.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/981450/GeminiArms/) and copy all game files into `assets` folder. Devices with `H700` cpus and above are recommended for performance reasons.
